name: John Kenneth Zabriskie
researcher_question: Who were the children of John Kenneth Zabriskie (1916-1985) of Nephi, Juab, Utah?
notes: Ground truth is the two children linked in the FamilySearch tree: Joleen (b.1946, d.2020) and Patricia Ann (b.1948, d.1970), both deceased. The 1950 US census (attached to Kenneth) and Ruth Tolley's 2008 obituary both attest the household. Note: the obituaries also name later children (Terri Kay, Kenny) not present in the stripped tree; those are legitimate bonus finds, not errors.
